$comment: Grandfathered accepted/implemented RFCs whose primary normative artifact is not yet folded into the canonical spec (issue #204). Each MUST cite a follow-up issue tracking the fold. Allowlisting skips ONLY the integration-completeness check (that every declared manifest token resolves and the manifest is non-empty); status legality, proposal-artifact-path existence, and .md<->record status consistency stay enforced. New accepted RFCs may NOT be added here without review — the gate (scripts/check-rfc-integration.mjs) hard-fails otherwise. Remove an entry once its follow-up lands and the RFC's manifest fully resolves.

017.reason: attaches sourceRole + contentPath schema changes folded; invariants I-101-I-112 still in records/tier-2 staging and com.semanticops.base settings type not yet folded
